commit.message:
Fix OIDC plugin bootstrap failure by using internal Pocket ID URL

The OIDC plugin fetches the discovery document at startup, but
auth.kennyandries.com resolves to the Traefik VIP which isn't ready yet,
causing a circular dependency. The plugin never retries, so all new OIDC
sessions fail until the next restart.

Point Provider.Url at the internal cluster service and set ValidIssuer
to preserve token validation against the external issuer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Phase F US-054: Progressive Shadow 6-stage gate orchestrator

ProgressiveShadowOrchestrator wraps ShadowMode with 6-stage automatic
extension (1H→2H→6H→12H→24H→72H). Each stage evaluates gate checks
before proceeding. Fail-fast on any stage failure.

- progressive_shadow.py: 6-stage gate evaluation, Sharpe self-computation,
  psutil resource monitoring, Prometheus gauges, DB persistence
- main.py: _progressive_shadow_loop() with SHADOW_PROGRESSIVE env var
- docker-compose.yml: mem_limit/cpus constraints for engine container
- DB migration 003: shadow_stage_results table
- 42 unit tests (stage gates, lifecycle, Sharpe, Telegram safety)
- Code review fixes: db_pool.pool.acquire(), Stage 3 tautology→min 2
  active strategies, _safe_int() for env vars, sample variance, deque
  snapshots, single stop() call on fail-fast

Shadow 10min: 580T, 67.2% WR, +$2203.92, crash=0
Tests: 3,575 passed, 0 failures, 89% coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add PDF report generator (NEXIO FAT Report)

Backend:
- Add reportlab to requirements.txt
- New GET /projects/{id}/report/pdf route using reportlab
  Page 1: Cover — dark header, NEXIO title, project info (panel ID, customer,
           PLC IP, date), company logo placeholder, NEXIO v1.0 footer
  Page 2: Summary — 4 stat cards (total/matched/missing/mismatch), pass rate
           percentage, segmented horizontal progress bar with legend
  Page 3+: Full I/O table — 9 columns (No., Address, Type, Status, TIA Name,
           TIA Comment, EPLAN Symbolic, EPLAN Comment, Wiring Instruction),
           PASS=white, WARNING=#FFF3E0, ERROR=#FFEBEE, repeating header,
           multi-page with page numbers
  Last page: Sign-off — Engineer/Supervisor/Customer signature blocks with
             name/signature/date underlines; NEXIO footer
- Filename: NEXIO_FAT_Report_{panel_id}_{date}.pdf

Frontend:
- api.ts: add downloadPdfReport() calling GET /report/pdf
- App.tsx: import downloadPdfReport; add pdfDownloading/pdfDownloadError state;
  handlePdfDownload handler; EXPORT PDF button below EXPORT XLSX

commit.message:
Mandoline: add net rows as standard for pre-aggregated Likert tables

Phase 2 design table now includes a Nets row — top-2-box (Net: Agree)
and bottom-2-box (Net: Disagree) rows for Likert scales. Without these,
downstream models have no path to stakeholder-friendly summary scores
because the linter correctly blocks SUM(pct).

Discovered via plg-nodomi in plongeur — WUAK happened to have them from
the original crosstab data, but a future mandoline build might not.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: dag 6-7 i FK-vecka ska ersättas på lägstanivå, inte SGI-nivå

fk_ndag * max(fk-5, 0) byttes ut mot lg_ndag/lg_bdag i
_komponenter_manad (rad 121-122). Extradag 6 och 7 är
helgdagsmotsvarigheter som Försäkringskassan betalar ut på
lägstanivå (180 kr/dag), inte sjukpenningnivå.

Felet orsakade ~5 000 kr/mån för högt värde i grafen vid 7 FK-dagar/vecka.

commit.message:
fix: normalize MCP server names for client config compatibility (#406)

* fix: normalize MCP server names for client config compatibility

Server names in reverse DNS format (e.g. com.toolhive.k8s/github-proxy)
are not supported by Claude Code CLI and other MCP clients. This change:

- Adds normalizeServerName() to replace dots and slashes with dashes,
  ensuring unique and valid identifiers for all MCP clients
- Uses server.title (when available) as the display name across the
  catalog card, table, and detail page, falling back to server.name

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: update catalog tests to use server title over name

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: always normalize server name for client config, clarify JSDoc

- Always apply normalizeServerName() to both title and name when building
  client configs, so titles with dots or slashes don't break Claude Code CLI
- Update JSDoc to clarify normalization does not guarantee uniqueness across
  names that differ only in "." vs "/"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: update e2e and unit tests to use server title

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: normalize server name inside AddMcpToClientDropdown

Move normalizeServerName call inside the component so all callers
(including future ones) get automatic normalization. Extend the
normalization to handle spaces and any invalid character (not just
dots and slashes), collapsing consecutive dashes and trimming edges.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: initial scaffold for Cardano Plutus VM benchmark suite

Six UPLC VM implementations (Rust, Zig, C#, Go, TypeScript, Python)
benchmarked via Docker with each VM's native benchmark framework.
Single ubuntu:24.04 runtime image ensures fair comparison.

Includes:
- Multi-stage Dockerfile building all 6 VMs from pinned git SHAs
- Per-VM runner scripts using native benchmarks (Criterion, BenchmarkDotNet, etc.)
- Output parsers normalizing 6 different formats into unified CSV
- Report generator with geometric mean comparison tables
- GitHub Actions workflow for scheduled/manual CI runs
- 78 canonical plutus_use_cases .flat benchmark scripts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix address sorting to be numeric rather than alphabetical

Backend: add _addr_sort_key() helper with pre-compiled regex; apply it to
the matched loop iteration, missing_in_eplan/tia sorted() calls, and all
four lists in the compare response (matched, missing_in_tia, missing_in_eplan,
comment_mismatches). Sort order: I < Q, then byte numerically, then bit
numerically — so %I100.0…%I100.7, %I101.0…, %I1000.0…, %Q100.0… etc.

Frontend: replace localeCompare sort in buildIORows with the same three-tuple
numeric key (prefix order, byte int, bit int).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Increase default retry config for Notion API calls

Fix carbide-api builder to match sno-manifests deployment

The API Deployment builder was missing critical configuration that
the real carbide-api binary needs to start:

- Add command: /opt/carbide/carbide-api run --config-path=...
- Add metrics port 1080 (alongside gRPC 1079)
- Switch probes from TCP on gRPC port to HTTP GET /metrics on 1080
- Read CARBIDE_API_DATABASE_URL from PGO user secret (uri key)
  instead of a separate carbide-api-secret
- Add Vault env vars (VAULT_ADDR, VAULT_TOKEN, VAULT_KV_MOUNT_LOCATION,
  VAULT_PKI_MOUNT_LOCATION, VAULT_PKI_ROLE_NAME) for both managed
  and external Vault modes
- Fix migration init container: use /opt/carbide/carbide-api with
  --datastore flag, add resource limits
- Add metrics port to Service

All changes match the sno-manifests carbide-api-deployment.yaml
and the Helm chart values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Fabien Dupont <fabiendupont@pm.me>

commit.message:
feat(toolpath): add P5 machine sound simulation (Step 11)

Add Web Audio API-based sound synthesis for toolpath playback:

New files:
- toolpathAudio.ts: Audio engine with spindle tone (sawtooth wave),
  cutting noise (filtered white noise), rapid sound (sine wave)
- ToolpathAudioPanel.vue: Audio controls panel with presets,
  volume/frequency/intensity sliders, test sound button

Features:
- Real-time sound modulation based on feed rate and Z depth
- 5 presets: Realistic, Spindle Only, Aggressive, Subtle, Silent
- Depth modulation option (deeper cuts = louder)
- Audio auto-starts/stops with playback
- Singleton pattern for engine instance

Integration:
- Sound button (🔊) in ToolpathPlayer controls bar
- Vue watchers sync audio state with playback progress

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add wiring_instruction field to compare endpoint and display in frontend

Backend: add _build_wiring_instruction() helper that builds a human-readable
wiring string from EPLAN PBF fields (eplan_symbolic, channel, comment).
Injected into all three compare row types at build-time:
  PASS    → "✓ Module {symbolic} Ch.{n}"
  WARNING → "⚠ Check wiring at Module ... EPLAN expects: '...' but TIA says: '...'"
  ERROR   → "✗ No EPLAN wiring found" / "✗ Not connected in TIA — EPLAN ref: ..."
Mismatch detection moved to build-time so status is known when building the row.

api.ts: add wiring_instruction to MatchedRow, MissingInEplanRow, MissingInTiaRow.

App.tsx: replace client-side connection field with server-provided wiring_instruction;
rename CONNECTION column to WIRING INSTRUCTION; style cell green/orange/grey by status.

App.css: replace .connection-cell with .wiring-cell + per-status colour modifiers.

commit.message:
fix: sort pills right edge clipping in RTL ScrollView

paddingHorizontal doesn't apply correctly to the right end of a
row-reverse ScrollView — using explicit paddingRight/paddingLeft instead
so the active "דירוג" pill is fully visible and חסומים clips as the
overflow indicator on the left

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix harvest bypass: block withdrawals when yield pending but harvest fails

Replace blanket try/catch in _harvestSafe() with targeted error handling.
Only Curve get_virtual_price() failure is caught (safe to skip when Curve
is down). When yield IS pending, harvest must succeed or withdrawal reverts,
preventing withdrawers from extracting unharvested yield from sINVAR stakers.

Removes harvestSafeExternal() — eliminates EIP-150 63/64 gas attack surface.

Developer (#123)

* docs: Add documentation link to README (#112)

Link to manual.alfacommerce.gr for full documentation.

* fix: Standard payment redirects to order completed page (#114)

* fix: Standard payment now redirects to order completed page

The Standard payment plugin was setting a layout in onOrderProcessView(),
which prevented the HtmlView fallback redirect to default_order_completed.
Since Standard is an offline payment method, it needs no processing step.

- Remove layout/data setting from Standard::onOrderProcessView()
- Add detailed docs explaining the pattern for gateway plugin developers
- Remove empty default_order_process.php from Standard plugin templates
- Move retry button inside the plugin layout condition so it only shows
  when an external gateway plugin actually renders a processing view

* style: auto-fix code style with PHP CS Fixer

* fix: Remove retry button from component template

Each payment plugin should include its own retry/cancel buttons
in its layout template if needed, not the component.

---------

Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update README.md

* docs: Rewrite README and update Postman link (#118)

* docs: Add documentation link to README

Link to manual.alfacommerce.gr for full documentation.

* docs: Update Postman collection link

* docs: Rewrite README and update Postman link (#119)

* docs: Add documentation link to README

Link to manual.alfacommerce.gr for full documentation.

* docs: Update Postman collection link

* fix: Correct Postman collection link in README (#120)

* fix: Security hardening, code quality, and project infrastructure (#122)

* fix: Security hardening, code quality fixes, and project infrastructure

- Escape all template output to prevent XSS (13 site + admin templates)
- Add CSRF token verification to clearCart controller action
- Fix $errorOccured typo to $errorOccurred in CartController
- Restore try-catch error handling in addToCart method
- Remove debug print_r from admin payments template
- Escape CSS color values in orderstatuses/orders to prevent CSS injection
- Remove continue-on-error from PHPStan security workflow
- Add FK constraints migration (1.0.3.sql) for all database relationships
- Extend .gitignore with IDE, build, env, and log entries
- Add PHPUnit test infrastructure (phpunit.xml.dist, bootstrap, example test)
- Add GitHub Actions workflow for CSS/JS asset minification
- Add CHANGELOG.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style: auto-fix code style with PHP CS Fixer

* fix: Fix php-security CI job and upgrade CodeQL to v4

- Replace php-actions/phpstan@v3 with direct composer install + CLI
  invocation, since the project has no composer.json for the action to
  locate PHPStan from
- Use existing phpstan.neon config for analysis
- Upgrade CodeQL action from v3 to v4 (v3 deprecated Dec 2026)

* fix: Remove duplicate PHPStan from security workflow, ignore missing Joomla classes

- Remove PHPStan from security-scan.yml (already covered by code-quality.yml)
- Security workflow now focuses on CodeQL, dependency audit, and secret scanning
- Add class.notFound ignore to phpstan.neon since no Joomla stubs package
  exists for CI environments

* fix: Add foreign key constraints to install SQL for fresh installs

The FK constraints from 1.0.3.sql update migration were missing from
install.mysql.utf8.sql, meaning fresh installs would have no referential
integrity. Adds all ~88 constraints to the install script.

* chore: Remove premature test scaffolding

No composer.json or CI workflow to support it yet. Will add properly
when the project is ready for automated testing.

* fix: Reorder uninstall SQL to respect foreign key constraints

Tables were dropped in alphabetical order, causing FK constraint errors
on uninstall. Now drops child/junction tables before parent tables and
wraps in SET FOREIGN_KEY_CHECKS = 0/1 as a safety net.

* fix: Build workflow now produces all gzip variants for htaccess

Previously only created file.min.css + file.min.css.gz. Now also creates
file.css.gz so htaccess gzip rewrite rules work in both production
(Joomla loads .min.css -> htaccess serves .min.css.gz) and debug mode
(Joomla loads .css -> htaccess serves .css.gz).

* fix: Simplify asset workflow to produce only .css.gz and .js.gz

Minify and gzip directly to file.css.gz / file.js.gz. No .min.css/.min.js
files needed — htaccess serves the .gz version transparently when the
browser requests the original file.

* fix: Add UNSIGNED to FK columns to match parent PK types (errno 150)

MySQL requires FK columns to have the exact same type as the referenced
PK. Parent tables use int(11) UNSIGNED for id but junction/child tables
used int(11) signed, causing errno 150 on install.

- install.mysql.utf8.sql: fix column definitions in CREATE TABLE
- 1.0.3.sql: prepend ALTER TABLE MODIFY COLUMN before FK constraints
  so existing installs get column types fixed before FKs are added
- Also fix currencies.id from int(1) to int(11) UNSIGNED

* fix: Restore original SQL schema from developer branch

Revert install SQL and update migrations to the developer branch state.
Remove 1.0.3.sql FK migration — column type mismatches (signed/unsigned,
wrong column names, MyISAM tables) caused installation failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Remove 1.0.3.sql update migration

repository.description: 미국 이주를 준비하는 한국인 부부를 위한 체크리스트/플래너 앱 (Python + Streamlit + SQLite)

commit.message:
feat(toolpath): add P5 toolpath comparison system (Step 10)

Add comprehensive toolpath comparison for before/after analysis:

toolpathComparison.ts:
- compareToolpaths() for full diff analysis
- computeToolpathStats() for individual toolpath stats
- Position-based segment matching with tolerance
- Stats diffs: time, distance, moves, feed rates
- Summary with verdict (improved/degraded/similar)

ToolpathComparePanel.vue:
- Drag-drop file upload for comparison G-code
- Paste G-code directly into textarea
- Built-in G-code parser for comparison file
- Stats comparison grid with improvement indicators
- Segment diff list with change descriptions
- Overlay toggle for visual comparison
- Purple-themed UI

ToolpathPlayer integration:
- 🔀 Compare button in controls bar
- Compare panel slide-in from right
- handleCompareSegments/handleCompareOverlayToggle handlers

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: luthiers-toolbox
repository.description: Parametric CAD/CAM suite for modern guitar makers. Design, visualize, and machine guitars with integrated costing, tonewood analytics, and CNC-ready DXF/G-code exports. Bridges traditional luthiery with digital fabrication.
